title: Staff: Shamon Shine-Lee
staff_title: Budget Officer, Office of Research Administration
previous_roles: Program Coordinator, School of Computer, Mathematical, and Natural Sciences (Morgan State, 2018-2022) — managing NIH, NSF, DOD and other agency grants
Project Administrator, ASCEND Center for Biomedical Research (Morgan State, 2015-2018) — managing NIH-funded cooperative agreement
Maryland Department of Health and Mental Hygiene
content:
Ms. Shamon Shine-Lee is the Budget Officer, Office of Research Administration.

Office: Tyler Hall, Suite 304. Phone: 443-885-4764. Email: shamon.shine-lee@morgan.edu.

Ms. Shamon Shine-Lee serves as a Budget Officer at the Office of Research Administration at Morgan State University. She holds a BS in Business Administration from Morgan State.

Ms. Shine-Lee has extensive experience in grant management. Prior to joining ORA in June 2022, she worked as Program Coordinator for the School of Computer, Mathematical, and Natural Sciences for four years (2018-2022), managing a variety of grants funded by the National Institutes of Health, National Science Foundation, Department of Defense, and other funding agencies.

She also served as Project Administrator at the ASCEND Center for Biomedical Research for three years (2015-2018), managing several aspects of a large NIH-funded cooperative agreement. Prior to joining Morgan, she worked with the Maryland Department of Health and Mental Hygiene and the Maryland Department of Transportation.

As a Morgan alumna, Ms. Shine-Lee wants to give back to the institution. She believes in family and teamwork.

Education: BS in Business Administration, Morgan State University.
